target: Implement the fixed adapter registry and explicit host-to-adapter invocation contract for shell, codex, claude, copilot, and gemini.
invariants: Keep tmux-host as an external host runtime; do not bake Dopemux-specific ownership into host core.
Preserve the source-first repo structure under src/tmux_host/ and the UI docs under docs/ui/.
Do not add broad allowlists or unrelated cleanup.
The adapter set stays explicit in v1.
Adapters own tool-specific invocation details; host core stays tool-agnostic.

commit.message: Implement adapter registry and invocation contract

steps.task: Document the adapter contract and create the adapter registry/base interfaces for the fixed v1 adapter set.
requirements: Keep the registry explicit; no dynamic plugin discovery.
Document required args and failure behavior precisely.

steps.task: Create wrapper modules for shell, codex, claude, copilot, and gemini that accept the common invocation contract and perform minimal preflight.
requirements: Do not depend on interactive shell rc files for correctness.
Keep richer env sanitization for the dedicated hardening packet later where possible.
Missing cwd or missing binary must fail precisely.

steps.task: Add narrow registry and invocation tests to prove adapter resolution and argument contract behavior.
requirements: Keep tests targeted to registry lookup and invocation contract behavior.
Do not test tmux lifecycle in this packet.
